email.subject: Urgent: Your account has been suspended

flags.message: SPF check failed — sender IP not authorised to send for this domain.
No DKIM signature found — email integrity cannot be verified.
Reply-To domain (evil.com) differs from From domain (paypa1.com) — classic BEC/phishing indicator.
Email claims to be from 'paypal' but sending domain is 'paypa1.com' not 'paypal.com'.
3 urgency phrase(s) detected: immediately, suspicious activity, verify now
1 credential phrase(s) detected: verify your identity

report.recommendation: DO NOT interact with this email. Block sender domain, report to security team, and delete immediately.
